# Secret Hour

> Quiet luxuries for married couples in Pakistan — card games, candles, and intimate gift sets.

Secret Hour is a Pakistani direct-to-consumer brand that sells thoughtfully designed products for married couples. All products help couples slow down, reconnect, and build intimate rituals. Ships free across Pakistan. Discreet, unmarked packaging on every order.

## Products

- [The Midnight Deck — Couples Card Game](https://secrethour.pk/product/the-midnight-deck): 60-card game for married couples with playful dares and meaningful questions. Rs. 2,999. Best-seller.
- [Bridal Box](https://secrethour.pk/product/bridal-box): Curated luxury gift set for newly married couples. Popular as a wedding night or nikkah gift.
- [Intimate Night Set](https://secrethour.pk/product/intimate-night-set): A complete intimate set for couples.
- [Midnight Glow Candle](https://secrethour.pk/product/midnight-glow-candle): Luxury scented candle for intimate evenings. Rs. 1,499.
- [Silk Bond](https://secrethour.pk/product/silk-bond): Intimate set for married couples. Rs. 999.
- [Shop all products](https://secrethour.pk/shop)

## Key pages

- [FAQ](https://secrethour.pk/info/faq): Delivery times, payment, packaging, returns
- [About Us](https://secrethour.pk/about): Brand story and values
- [Shipping Policy](https://secrethour.pk/info/shipping): Free delivery, 2–5 business days across Pakistan
- [Returns & Exchange](https://secrethour.pk/info/returns): 7-day return on unopened items
- [Testimonials](https://secrethour.pk/testimonials): Reviews from couples across Pakistan
- [Experience Quiz](https://secrethour.pk/quiz): Help finding the right product
- [Contact](https://secrethour.pk/contact): Email or WhatsApp

## Pricing & delivery

- All prices in PKR. Free delivery across Pakistan on all orders.
- Cash on Delivery available. 10% discount for bank transfer payment.
- Delivery: 2–5 business days. Packaging: fully discreet, no external branding.
